text.title: Eloquent ORM Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use DB:: query builder + chunkById; Eloquent hydration dominates
skip-this-methodology — bypass Eloquent for inserts; use DB::table()->insert() + LazyCollection
wrap in DB::transaction + DB::afterCommit side effects

branch.question: Resource or controller touches a relation?

conclusion.verdict: eager-load at repository boundary via ->with(...) before serialisation
apply remaining rules — fillable + Attribute::make + paired migration/factory/resource on diff

text.example: shape=transactional_oltp → shape=multistep_write (create + attach roles) → db-transaction-multiwrite → wrap in DB::transaction; queue welcome email via DB::afterCommit.
